title: Astonish Ocean Toilet Fresh Gel, Kills 99.9% of Bacteria, Limescale Prevention, 750ml
features: Kills Bacteria: Astonish Toilet Fresh kills 99.9% of bacteria, leaving your toilet bowl clean and shiny
Prevention: As well as cleaning, Astonish Toilet Fresh protects your toilet from dirt and future limescale buildup
Fresh Fragrance: The marine and citrus scent will leave your toilet smelling pleasant for longer
Easy Application: The bespoke bottle neck makes 360° toilet cleaning easier, so you can target those hard-to-reach areas
Vegan & Cruelty Free: At Astonish, we are proud that all our products are 100% vegan and completely animal cruelty free, giving you peace of mind
description: Product Description Experience a deep clean with a fresh ocean breeze using Astonish Ocean Toilet Fresh Gel. This 750ml antibacterial toilet cleaner kills 99.9% of bacteria and helps prevent stubborn limescale build-up, ensuring your toilet stays hygienic and gleaming. The thick gel formula clings to the bowl for effective coverage, while the refreshing ocean scent leaves your bathroom smelling clean and revitalised. Like all Astonish products, it’s vegan, cruelty-free, and proudly made in the UK — effective cleaning that’s better for your home and the planet. Ingredients <5% Non-Ionic Surfactants, Cationic Surfactants, Perfume, 2.495g/l Quaternery Ammonium Compounds, Benzyl-C12-16-alkyldimethyl, Chlorides Directions Lift the toilet seat. Squeeze and unscrew the cap for removal. Tip up the bottle. Gently squeeze the bottle and direct the product under the toilet rim, covering the bowl completely. For best results, leave for 30 minutes before flushing. Screw the cap back on tightening until a click is heard. Use regularly to keep your toilet hygienically clean and fresh. Manufacturer Contact Information Manufactured by: UK: The London Oil Refining Company Ltd., Bradford, BD3 7AF, UK. IE: Astonish Cleaners Europe Ltd, Dublin, Republic of Ireland, K67E 0A2. See more
